---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case you have in mind.

## Proposed Solution

How you think this could work. Include CLI examples if applicable:

```bash
bb your-new-command --flag value
```

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Anything else — screenshots, links to similar tools, etc.
